Saturn will have influence
as per the planets conjoined with. With this reason, Saturn won't
harm anyone. This is a significant statement.
At the time of birth, if Saturn is posited in Aries (Mesha)
and at the same time Mars (Kuja) is also posited there itself, &
ifMoon (chandra) - Ketu and posited in 2nd to Mesha, the
native cannot perform andy defmite profession. All the above 3
planets combination bring lot of hardship to the native.
The 7 house from Mesha isa female sign as per
Kalapursha or Time Personification or natural zodiac. Vrishabha
is also a female sign. 7 sign from this is a male sign, the house
of Mars, the significator of Husband. I 0 house from Mesha is
a Lord of profession's house, and I 0 is the house of gains.
Saturn (Sani) alone is for the profession I Karma and gains from
the professin is also obtained I enjoyed by Saturn I Sani. The loss
or expenditure is as per the evil deeds & earned by virtuous life.
